strategy: Raid boss; you can use the Inspired Casts offered this battle (Brush Fire, Dismal Seraph, Fabled Revenant, Levin Bruin, Rotting Fomori, War Oracle) as free hits, so work them into your plan.
He resists Globals 70%, so Doom and Gloom and similar barely stick; do not rely on them.
Do not cast blades. A blade makes him cast Eye of Vigilance.
Do not cast damage-over-time; a DoT makes him cast Jinn's Fortune (currently bugged, so low risk, but avoid feeding it).
He self-feeds pips with Power Current every Round and Donate Power (+4), so he ramps; end the fight before his damage spikes.
Set up without blades or DoTs, lean on the Inspired Casts, and burst him down.
cheatNotes: You have access to powerful Inspired Cast spells this fight; use them as free damage in your rotation.
He Power-Currents himself for pips every Round, so he ramps quickly; do not let the fight drag.
He can heal with Sprite and hand himself 4 power pips with Donate Power; expect steady pip gain.
Casting a blade makes him cast Eye of Vigilance; keep blade use minimal.
A damage-over-time makes him cast Jinn's Fortune, currently bugged; low risk but avoid feeding it.
